Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents Set One

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Hayk Proshyna, esq. (310-929-4941) of Strategic Legal Practices for Plaintiff SHAHEDA BUNO via Court Call.
Jonathan M. Shugart, esq. (248-601-4499) of Erskine Law for Defendant General Motors LLC.
Court reporter:David Disbrow, CSR #7768 (415-298-1538 email david415d@yahoo.com)

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript). Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHAHEDA BUNO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents Set One is continued to February 26, 2019 at 2:00pm in Dept 301. In person appearance required. No telephonic appearance permitted. Parties stipulated to the authority of Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein to rule on the upcoming motion for a protective order to be heard with this motion to compel documents.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter:David Disbrow, CSR #7768 (415-298-1538 email david415d@yahoo.com). =(302/JPT)
